_meta.description: Scoped product-help snippets for help/fallback prompt enrichment.

snippets.en: I can only use indexed files in the current scope. Attach/select the target document and retry.
snippets.pt: Eu so posso usar arquivos indexados no escopo atual. Anexe/selecione o documento alvo e tente novamente.
snippets.es: Solo puedo usar archivos indexados en el alcance actual. Adjunta/selecciona el documento objetivo e intentalo de nuevo.
snippets.any: Use indexed files in the current scope. Select the target document and retry.

snippets.en: DOCX editing is target-first: identify paragraph/range, then apply the change.
snippets.pt: A edicao DOCX comeca pelo alvo: identifique paragrafo/intervalo e depois aplique a mudanca.
snippets.es: La edicion DOCX empieza por el objetivo: identifica parrafo/rango y luego aplica el cambio.
snippets.any: DOCX editing is target-first: identify range before applying changes.

snippets.en: Spreadsheet edits should include sheet + range (e.g. Sheet1!A1:C5) for safe scope.
snippets.pt: Edicoes em planilha devem incluir aba + intervalo (ex.: Planilha1!A1:C5) para escopo seguro.
snippets.es: Las ediciones en hoja deben incluir hoja + rango (ej.: Hoja1!A1:C5) para un alcance seguro.
snippets.any: Use sheet + range for spreadsheet edits to keep scope precise.
